name: Charlie's Pickled Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the water, salt, crab boil seasoning, and pepper to a boil.
2. Squeeze in the lemon juice and add the rinds.
3. Pour in the shrimp, all at once. Bring back to a boil over high heat.
4. Boil 3 minutes—no more.
5. Remove from heat and add 3-4 cups ice cubes to stop cooking. Let stand 5-10 minutes.
6. When cool enough to handle, peel the shrimp, leaving the last tail segment attached. Set aside.
7. In a large bowl, stir together the remaining ingredients.
8. Add shrimp to the marinade and toss well to coat.
9. Cover tightly and refrigerate overnight or up to two days, tossing occasionally in the marinade.
10. Drain before serving on a large platter or decorative bowl lined with lettuce leaves. Garnish with a scattering of ripe olives.
